Label: /FR-U-20/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when no neural network is selected
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to start the inference without selecting a neural network.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats only.

Label: /FR-U-80/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when no input image is selected
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to start the inference without selecting an input image.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format for exporting results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in a CSV format.

Label: /FR-U-120/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the inference is aborted
Correction: The system shall display a confirmation message when the inference is aborted and return to the starting screen.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of arguments to be checked for validity
Correction: The system shall check the validity of neural network selection, input image selection, and hardware component selection.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum height and width for input images
Correction: The height and width of input images should be at least 224x224 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when an incompatible neural network is imported
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the imported neural network topology is not compatible with the specified hardware.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: Does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
Correction: The inference results and diagnostic data shall be provided in a structured format, such as JSON or XML.

Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the default neural networks are not available
Correction: The system shall display an error message if no default neural networks are available for selection.
